content:
# Session 41 — review summary

## Verdict: NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (5th consecutive)

`attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{no_prover_lane: true, iter: 41}`; `prover.jsonl` empty; `sync_leanok`
iter=41 sha=`816d150` +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. Single extraction commit `c53d9c9` — no `.lean`
edit since iter-036, so no regression is possible.

## State (independently re-verified)
- Core leg files (`SectionGradedRing`/`GrassmannianQuot`/`GrassmannianCells`/`GlueDescent`/
  `GradedHilbertSerre`) all 0-sorry. `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` lone grep hit is a comment, not a
  typed sorry.
- Only out-of-leg sorries remain: `Picard/QuotScheme.lean` (4 typed χ skeletons, L126/165/201/228) and
  `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean` (typed sorries). Both are the deliberately-carved cohomology /
  relative-spec legs — resolve at merge, do NOT re-probe.

## Leg deliverables (axiom-clean `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`, awaiting merge)
`Grassmannian.represents` · `tautologicalQuotient_epi` · B1–B7 associativity coherence · ∀L graded
`GSemiring` · invertible-L graded `GCommSemiring` · module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`.

## No-dispatch is correct (re-weighed, all decline)
- Re-probe χ: wrong — `hilbertPolynomial` body is genuinely Snapper/cohomology-gated (read iter-038).
- Open cohomology megaleg: overreach — strategy-critic repeatedly ruled H⁰ scope SOUND, Mathlib lacks
  scheme-cohomology, user has not opened it via USER_HINTS.
- Split the done 4k-line file: busywork — the split directive targets files with UNPROVED theorems;
  this axiom-clean 0-sorry file has none.

Reverse signal: USER_HINTS opens cohomology scope, or a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces.

## Blueprint doctor (out-of-cone, do NOT edit — merge-time)
Dormant inherited chapters only: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange` (2 phantom covers for non-existent
`FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 14 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent` (4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`),
`Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). No prover dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute
nothing. Parent reconciles at merge.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls (single-commit extraction).
Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor / lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` file modified this iter (no prover lane, 0 edits).
- progress/strategy/blueprint reviewers: plan-phase; route closed iter-036, STRATEGY.md unchanged.
